option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <gradient android:angle="140" android:startColor="@color/navHeaderStart" android:centerColor="#5A3FA5" android:endColor="@color/navHeaderEnd" android:type="linear" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <layer-list xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
<item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <gradient android:angle="145" android:startColor="@color/navHeaderStart" android:centerColor="#5A3FA5" android:endColor="@color/navHeaderEnd" android:type="linear" /> </shape> </item>
<item> <shape android:shape="rectangle"> <gradient android:angle="90" android:startColor="#00000000" android:endColor="#42000000" android:type="linear" /> </shape> </item>
</layer-list>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="168dp" android:background="@drawable/nav_header_bg" android:paddingStart="@dimen/nav_header_side_padding" android:paddingTop="@dimen/nav_header_top_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/nav_header_side_padding" android:paddingBottom="18dp">
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/nav_header_readability_scrim" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/logo_container" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/navHeaderLogoBg" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="3dp" app:strokeColor="@color/navHeaderLogoStroke" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/imageView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:padding="13dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.Material3.Corner.Large" app:srcCompat="@drawable/wp_logo_512dp" />
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="15dp" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" android:textColor="@color/navHeaderOn" android:letterSpacing="0.01" android:shadowColor="#4D000000" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="1" android:shadowRadius="4" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/logo_container" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/logo_container" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/textView" app:layout_constraintVertical_chainStyle="packed" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_tagline" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.LabelMedium" android:textColor="@color/navHeaderSub" android:letterSpacing="0.02" android:shadowColor="#40000000" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="1" android:shadowRadius="3" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/textView2" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/textView2" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/logo_container" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minHeight="168dp" android:background="@drawable/nav_header_bg" android:paddingStart="@dimen/nav_header_side_padding" android:paddingTop="@dimen/nav_header_top_padding" android:paddingEnd="@dimen/nav_header_side_padding" android:paddingBottom="18dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/logo_container" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/navHeaderLogoBg" app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="@color/navHeaderLogoStroke" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.imageview.ShapeableImageView android:id="@+id/imageView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:padding="11dp" android:scaleType="centerInside" app:shapeAppearanceOverlay="@style/ShapeAppearance.Material3.Corner.Large" app:srcCompat="@drawable/wp_logo_512dp" />
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView2" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleMedium" android:textColor="@color/navHeaderOn" android:letterSpacing="0.005" android:shadowColor="#5E000000" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="1.2" android:shadowRadius="5" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/logo_container" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/logo_container" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/textView" app:layout_constraintVertical_chainStyle="packed" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="@string/nav_tagline" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.LabelSmall" android:textColor="@color/navHeaderSub" android:letterSpacing="0.01" android:shadowColor="#50000000" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="1.2" android:shadowRadius="4" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/textView2" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/textView2" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/logo_container" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Refined Material 3 Dark Palette --> <color name="primary">#D0BCFF</color> <color name="onPrimary">#381E72</color> <color name="primaryContainer">#4F378B</color> <color name="onPrimaryContainer">#EADDFF</color>
<color name="secondary">#CCC2DC</color> <color name="onSecondary">#332D41</color> <color name="secondaryContainer">#4A4458</color> <color name="onSecondaryContainer">#E8DEF8</color>
<color name="background">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="onBackground">#E6E1E5</color> <color name="surface">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="onSurface">#E6E1E5</color> <color name="surfaceVariant">#49454F</color> <color name="onSurfaceVariant">#CAC4D0</color> <color name="outline">#938F99</color>
<!-- Navigation drawer tones --> <color name="navDrawerBackground">#1F1D24</color> <color name="navHeaderStart">#5E46A7</color> <color name="navHeaderEnd">#3E2B70</color> <color name="navHeaderOn">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderSub">#D8CCFF</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimStart">#4D000000</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimEnd">#22000000</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoBg">#2EFFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoStroke">#7AFFFFFF</color> <color name="navFooterDivider">#26E6E1E5</color>
<!-- Dark Mode Splash Background --> <color name="splash_background">#1C1B1F</color>
<!-- App Icon Colors synchronized with Splash Background --> <color name="ic_launcher_background">@color/splash_background</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</color> <color name="colorPrimaryDark">#000000</color> <color name="colorAccent">@color/secondary</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Refined Material 3 Dark Palette --> <color name="primary">#D0BCFF</color> <color name="onPrimary">#381E72</color> <color name="primaryContainer">#4F378B</color> <color name="onPrimaryContainer">#EADDFF</color>
<color name="secondary">#CCC2DC</color> <color name="onSecondary">#332D41</color> <color name="secondaryContainer">#4A4458</color> <color name="onSecondaryContainer">#E8DEF8</color>
<color name="background">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="onBackground">#E6E1E5</color> <color name="surface">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="onSurface">#E6E1E5</color> <color name="surfaceVariant">#49454F</color> <color name="onSurfaceVariant">#CAC4D0</color> <color name="outline">#938F99</color>
<!-- Navigation drawer tones --> <color name="navDrawerBackground">#1F1D24</color> <color name="navHeaderStart">#5E46A7</color> <color name="navHeaderEnd">#3E2B70</color> <color name="navHeaderOn">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderSub">#E9E0FF</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimStart">#4D000000</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimEnd">#22000000</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoBg">#2BFFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoStroke">#8FFFFFFF</color> <color name="navFooterDivider">#26E6E1E5</color>
<!-- Dark Mode Splash Background --> <color name="splash_background">#1C1B1F</color>
<!-- App Icon Colors synchronized with Splash Background --> <color name="ic_launcher_background">@color/splash_background</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</color> <color name="colorPrimaryDark">#000000</color> <color name="colorAccent">@color/secondary</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Refined Material 3 Light Palette --> <color name="primary">#4F378B</color> <color name="onPrimary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="primaryContainer">#EADDFF</color> <color name="onPrimaryContainer">#21005D</color>
<color name="secondary">#625B71</color> <color name="onSecondary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="secondaryContainer">#E8DEF8</color> <color name="onSecondaryContainer">#1D192B</color>
<color name="background">#F6F6F6</color> <color name="onBackground">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="onSurface">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="surfaceVariant">#E7E0EB</color> <color name="onSurfaceVariant">#49454F</color> <color name="outline">#79747E</color>
<!-- Navigation drawer tones --> <color name="navDrawerBackground">#FFFCFF</color> <color name="navHeaderStart">#2F2368</color> <color name="navHeaderEnd">#6D33D1</color> <color name="navHeaderOn">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderSub">#E3D9FF</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimStart">#3A000000</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimEnd">#12000000</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoBg">#38FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoStroke">#90FFFFFF</color> <color name="navFooterDivider">#1A1C1B1F</color>
<color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="orange_fire">#FF4500</color>
<!-- Splash Screen Color --> <color name="splash_background">#4F378B</color>
<!-- App Icon Colors synchronized with Splash Background --> <color name="ic_launcher_background">@color/splash_background</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</color> <color name="colorPrimaryDark">#31111D</color> <color name="colorAccent">@color/secondary</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Refined Material 3 Light Palette --> <color name="primary">#4F378B</color> <color name="onPrimary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="primaryContainer">#EADDFF</color> <color name="onPrimaryContainer">#21005D</color>
<color name="secondary">#625B71</color> <color name="onSecondary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="secondaryContainer">#E8DEF8</color> <color name="onSecondaryContainer">#1D192B</color>
<color name="background">#F6F6F6</color> <color name="onBackground">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="onSurface">#1C1B1F</color> <color name="surfaceVariant">#E7E0EB</color> <color name="onSurfaceVariant">#49454F</color> <color name="outline">#79747E</color>
<!-- Navigation drawer tones --> <color name="navDrawerBackground">#FFFCFF</color> <color name="navHeaderStart">#2F2368</color> <color name="navHeaderEnd">#6D33D1</color> <color name="navHeaderOn">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderSub">#F0E9FF</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimStart">#3A000000</color> <color name="navHeaderScrimEnd">#12000000</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoBg">#30FFFFFF</color> <color name="navHeaderLogoStroke">#A3FFFFFF</color> <color name="navFooterDivider">#1A1C1B1F</color>
<color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="orange_fire">#FF4500</color>
<!-- Splash Screen Color --> <color name="splash_background">#4F378B</color>
<!-- App Icon Colors synchronized with Splash Background --> <color name="ic_launcher_background">@color/splash_background</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="colorPrimary">@color/primary</color> <color name="colorPrimaryDark">#31111D</color> <color name="colorAccent">@color/secondary</color> </resources>
